title: Sikkim & Darjeeling Delight
shortDescription: Majestic Kangchenjunga views, tea gardens, and Buddhist monasteries.
overview: Discover the mist-clad mountains of the North East. Enjoy world-famous Darjeeling tea and explore the monasteries of Sikkim.

itinerary.title: Darjeeling Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Tiger Hill sunrise, Batasia Loop, Tea Gardens.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Gangtok
itinerary.description: Drive to the capital of Sikkim.

itinerary.title: Gangtok Local Tour
itinerary.description: Rumtek Monastery, Enchey Monastery, Flower Show.
